description: Automation features and AI chat: auto budget generator by housing type, dashboard alerts (overdue invoices, expiring budgets, today visits), and rewrite normativa page as chat interface with keyword-based intelligent responses.
steps: Add auto budget modal to presupuestos/nuevo with housing type, rooms, bathrooms, kitchen options and price generation logic
Add alerts section to dashboard (overdue invoices >30 days, budgets expiring <3 days, today visits)
Rewrite normativa/page.tsx as chat interface with message bubbles, suggestion chips, and keyword-based response system
acceptance_criteria: Budget page has 'Generar presupuesto automatico' button that opens modal
Modal asks for tipo (piso/chalet/local), habitaciones (1-6), banos (1-3), cocina independiente (si/no)
Auto-generated budget includes cuadro electrico, rooms, kitchen, bathrooms, salon, entrada/pasillo, general items with specified prices
Dashboard shows alerts section with overdue invoices (>30 days, red), expiring budgets (<3 days, orange), today visits (blue)
Normativa page is a chat interface with messages (user right, assistant left)
Chat has welcome message and suggestion chips
Keyword-based responses cover all specified topics (seccion, magnetotermico, circuito, horno, lavadora, alumbrado, enchufe, tierra, derivacion, electrificacion, caida, precio, piso)
npx next build passes without errors
verification: Run `npx next build` in /projects/sandbox/electricista-app and confirm successful build
